final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-concept-art
Asset type: concept art for steampunk mechanical device
Primary request: intricate steampunk mechanical device with gears, pipes and gauges
Scene/backdrop: isolated studio backdrop to highlight the machinery
Subject: complex mechanical apparatus featuring interlocking brass gears, copper pipes, pressure gauges, Victorian decorative elements
Style/medium: detailed technical illustration, steampunk aesthetic, Victorian industrial design
Composition/framing: medium close-up, three-quarter view to showcase depth and complexity
Lighting/mood: warm directional lighting from above, dramatic shadows emphasizing metallic textures, nostalgic and sophisticated atmosphere
Color palette: rich brass gold + aged copper + warm bronze + deep brown leather accents + subtle verdigris patina
Materials/textures: polished brass with subtle scratches, hammered copper surfaces, riveted metal plates, ornate Victorian engravings
Constraints: maintain Victorian-era decorative flourishes alongside industrial functionality
Avoid: plastic appearance, overly clean surfaces, modern digital UI elements, anachronistic materials
